title: Analyst Model Walkback
body: One optimistic spreadsheet gets replaced by another with more footnotes and less forgiveness.

title: Call Transcript Supercut
body: A finance blog edits your quarter's bravado into a five-minute reel of contradictions.

title: Guidance Correction
body: The heroic call earns a follow-up filing with the emotional range of a hostage note.

title: Consulting Conflict Memo
body: An internal memo notes that the advisory contract seems remarkably well-tailored to you.

title: Invoice Rounding Pattern
body: A forensic accountant notices that random-looking invoices keep rounding in your favor.

title: Suspicious 10b5 Window
body: The sale technically follows a plan, which only makes the timing look more cultivated.

title: Broker Chat Subpoena
body: The regulator asks for trader messages with the tone of someone who already read them.

title: Compensation Deck Leak
body: A slide deck comparing executive incentives to labor concessions leaves the boardroom alive.

title: Intercompany Fee Memo
body: A board memo explains why the airline is paying the holding company for wisdom that looks suspiciously like your salary twice.
